features: Meditation for your eyes - The most advanced lenses we've ever made, that turn visual noise and distracting light into calm for every part of your day

Ultimate Eye Comfort with Anti-Reflective Reading Glasses Lenses and Spring Hinges - ERA's advanced AR, anti-glare technology reduces harsh reflections from screens, headlights, and bright lights - helping your eyes feel relaxed and calm all day long

Work Smarter with Advanced Blue Light Protection - Designed for screen-heavy days, ERA filters harmful blue light to reduce eye strain, boost focus, and help prevent headaches, great for working professionals, gamers or students

Comfortable Blue Light Reading Glasses - Built-in magnification with eye protection in one, ERA's oversized square frame combines bold styling with practical reading support - great for screen use, books, or everyday reading
Colour and strength: brown tortoiseshell, +1.00, pouch included
description: Product Description A London based, family run business since 2012, we take pride in every pair of glasses we create. Each design is meticulously crafted to combine functionality and sophistication, ensuring that you not only enjoy optimal vision but also make a statement with your style. All our glasses are affordable, comfortable and made with family business care. We make stylish frames with lenses for everybody, from blue light to reading glasses and sunglasses. And finally, we believe with our glasses you can have a pair for everywhere. A pair for the car, for the kitchen and for bed time. Crafted from scratch, to look good & feel good Variety of colours and styles From bold to minimal, our blue light glasses come in styles and colours to match every outfit, mood, or moment of your day. High quality frames Our glasses are designed with spring hinges in every pair, so that they can adapt perfectly to your face shape for all day wear. Different frame for every face With shapes to suit every face, our blue light glasses are made to fit and flatter, so you can feel confident and comfortable, at an affordable price. A pair for everywhere Our multi-packs come in colours and lens types for every occasion, so you can work, scroll, stream and unwind all in a day with the same style. The ERA Blue Light Collection ERA All Day Blue Light Glasses ERA Outdoor Blue Light Glasses ERA Sleep Blue Light Glasses When to wear them? Work & Indoors When to wear them? Outdoors, Sunshine & Night Driving When to wear them? Sleep & Recovery Benefits Reduce eyestrain whilst working at your computer all day Benefits Block blue light and bright light, especially for sunshine and night driving Benefits Support sleep consistency and avoid circadian interruption for improved recovery Special features Available in 5 stylish colours, affordable and comfortable lightweight frames Special features Polarised Sunlight Lenses Special features 99.9% Blue Light Blocking Just Launched Discover our new styles Previous page Coming Soon BIG Available in Blue Light Glasses & Sunglasses Available Now Search 'Opulize NYX' Available in Blue Light & Reading Glasses Just Arrived ERA Available in Sunglasses & Blue Light Next page 1 BIG 2 NYX 3 ERA
